attributes.action: Ban religious knives off our streets - Apply the law in a fair and uniform way!
attributes.background: Ban all knives from British streets including those for religious or ceremonial purposes. The law should be applied equally for all without fear or favour. Stop the two tier practise of allowing religious and ceremonial knives. Ban all bladed articles regardless  of purpose including Sikh knives.Now

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: “Ban carrying religious, cultural & ceremonial bladed & pointed items in public” https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/770412
